title: Not Enough Foods
description: Adds more food to your game
body:
![notenoughfoodsmod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a6dbc8ece9a8fce36451957a8b86e2e280a60fa.png)
- Adds **more food** to your game!
- Available Foods:
- Donuts
- Steak Tartare
- McDonalds Foods
- Hotdog
- IceCreams
- Lemon Juice
- Apple Juice
- Orange Juice
- Candy
- Pizza
- Diamond Apple
- Download **now**!
